summary: Seed from Current Feature - All Tests Passed. Backend POST /api/cms/register-defaults endpoint works correctly. Idempotent behavior verified (doesn't overwrite existing data). Auto-seed triggers on solution page visit after 1.5s. Admin CMS shows green dot for seeded pages. Expanded form shows populated fields. Solution pages render correctly after auto-seed.

tests: Creates new entry if not exists - returns {created: true}
Idempotent - returns {created: false} if key already has data
Does NOT overwrite existing data on subsequent calls

pages_tested: /solutions/home-theater - triggered auto-seed, CMS data created with all 8 sections
/solutions/lighting-automation - triggered auto-seed, CMS data created correctly

features_verified: 'Seed from Current' button visible and clickable on Solutions tab
Green dot indicator shows for seeded pages (home-theater, lighting-automation)
Expanded form fields populated with seeded data (Hero Badge, Title, Audience, etc.)

Solution page rendering after seed.verification: Home theater page renders correctly with all sections (Hero, Who We Serve, Common Problems, etc.)

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/cms/register-defaults correctly checks for existing data before inserting
Idempotent design prevents accidental overwrites - existing CMS customizations are preserved
Auto-seed fires after 1.5s delay via isCmsEmpty check in useCms hook
Cache invalidation happens after register-defaults via cache.delete(f'cms:{key}')
SeoLandingPageTemplate correctly passes all hardcoded props to seedCmsDefaults
seed_data_creation: Test created entries with prefix TEST_seed_* for backend tests. Also triggered auto-seed for page_solutions_home-theater and page_solutions_lighting-automation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seed from Current feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint POST /api/cms/register-defaults is idempotent - only creates if CMS data doesn't exist. Auto-seed in SeoLandingPageTemplate fires 1.5s after page load when isCmsEmpty returns true. Admin CMS Solutions tab has 'Seed from Current' button. Green dots indicate pages with CMS data. Seeded pages: page_solutions_home-theater, page_solutions_lighting-automation, page_solutions_security.
